name: payload_8x8x6in_36h11_left12_right13
coordinate_frame: Origin at payload center. X is left/right face normal, Y is vertical, Z is front/back depth. Tags are centered on the left and right faces.
notes: Payload size is 8 x 8 x 6 inches = 0.2032 x 0.2032 x 0.1524 m.
Tag IDs: 12 on left face, 13 on right face.
Tag size is 100 mm measured across the outer black square.
If the displayed left/right sign is flipped, swap the center_m/normal_m signs for IDs 12 and 13.
